UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIANG, LORI O. W. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, FRANCES LEE, DENISE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1470 HOLYOKE AVENUE, APT. C, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, INCLUDE ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INTO THE JUDGMENT SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIANG, LORI O. W. AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, FRANCES LEE, DENISE DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
